original_image_tags: The reverse side of a weathered, off-white document page with two hole-punch marks at the top. There is significant paper aging and yellowing, particularly on the left edge. The page contains faint bleed-through text from the front side, a handwritten signature in the center, and two stamped notations at the bottom. The stamps are oriented upside-down relative to the page's current orientation.

elements.description: Two date stamps at the bottom: one red ink stamp reading 'NOV 1 2 1964' with partially illegible text above it, and one blue ink stamp reading 'REC'D-CORP & BUREAUS FBI NOV 12 9 31 AM '64'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (a weathered page with two stamps at the bottom), but Description A omits the specific stamp text provided by Description B without contradicting it.
